svg.title: Boolean flag data flow — where the mismatch occurs
svg.desc: Flowchart showing how isStartingPointFromSearch travels from frontend state through JSON payload to Jackson deserialization, with the mismatch highlighted at the backend DTO.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain map tap handler in mapUtils.jsx')
sendPrompt('Show how the rideData object is built in handleCreateRide')
sendPrompt('What does the JSON payload look like when sent to the API?')
sendPrompt('Why does Jackson strip the is prefix from boolean getters?')
sendPrompt('Explain how @JsonProperty fixes the is prefix stripping')
